rag_rules: Use assume for input envelope conditions and guarantee for output behavior relations derived from visible features.
Bind expressions in guarantees only to identifiers explicitly present in the model context.
generic_rules: Anchor assumptions and guarantees to observable system features, not abstract properties or unexposed model elements.
Ensure all variables in AGREE clauses are syntactically visible as ports, constants, or named expressions in the component scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; with quoted labels and semicolon termination.
Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) directly — they are not in AGREE variable scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid using AADL property names as if they are AGREE variables — they will cause unresolved reference errors.
Do not generate clauses that reference internal component state not exposed as a visible feature or port.
